summary: Iteration 36 Testing - Dynamic Market Segments and Visual Redesign. ALL requested features VERIFIED WORKING. Backend: GET /api/geography/market-segments returns segments with id, name, color fields (Enterprise, SME, Strategic, Testing Market Segment). Frontend: Edit/Create Operator dialogs show dynamic segments from API. Access Scopes create/edit shows dynamic market segments with checkboxes. Pod Management has gradient stat cards (blue, amber, violet, emerald). Pod cards show blue selection ring/border when selected. Member cards show role-specific colored borders (violet for Technician visible). Add Member modal uses card grid role selection instead of dropdown.

issues: Pre-existing: Notifications API console error (AxiosError) - not related to current features

operator_management_dynamic_segments.create_operator_dialog: PASS - Market Segment dropdown shows dynamic segments from API

access_scopes_dynamic_segments.create_edit_scope_modal: PASS - Market Segments section shows dynamic segments (Enterprise, SME, Strategic, Testing Market Segment) with checkboxes

pod_management_visual_redesign.gradient_stat_cards: PASS - 4 gradient cards (blue=Total Pods, amber=With Team Leads, violet=Assigned Operators, emerald=Total Members)
pod_management_visual_redesign.pod_card_selection: PASS - Selected pod (Alpha Team) shows blue selection ring, blue border, shadow, and gradient background
pod_management_visual_redesign.member_cards_role_colors: PASS - Member cards show role-specific borders (e.g., violet for Technician)
pod_management_visual_redesign.add_member_modal_role_grid: PASS - Role selection uses card grid with 5 options: Team Lead, BDR, CSM, Technician, Support Agent

employees_management_visual_redesign.gradient_stat_cards: PASS - 4 gradient cards (blue=Total Employees, emerald=Active, amber=On Leave, violet=Monthly Payroll)
